subject: My internet has been down for 3 days!
body: Hi, I am absolutely furious. My broadband has not worked for 3 days now. I work from home and this is causing me serious problems. I have called your support line twice and been put on hold for over an hour each time. This is completely unacceptable. I want this fixed today or I am cancelling my contract.

subject: Query about my latest bill
body: Hello, I received my bill this month and it seems higher than usual. I was expecting to pay around 45 pounds but the bill shows 67 pounds. Could you please explain the additional charges? I have been a customer for 5 years and never had this issue before.

subject: Would like to upgrade my plan
body: Hi there, I am currently on the Basic 50MB plan and would like to find out about upgrading to a faster package. Could you let me know what options are available and the costs involved? I am particularly interested in whether you offer any loyalty discounts for existing customers.
